name: @octocodeai/octocode-context-utils
description: Rust LLM context engine for agent-readable compression, semantic signatures, deterministic pagination, and YAML serialization
author: Guy Bary <bgauryy@octocodeai.com>

scripts.build: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform --release && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform --release --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.build:darwin-x64: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform --release --target x86_64-apple-darwin && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.build:linux-x64-gnu: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform --release --cross-compile --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.build:linux-x64-musl: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform --release --cross-compile --target x86_64-unknown-linux-musl && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.build:linux-arm64-gnu: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform --release --cross-compile --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.build:windows-x64: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform --release --cross-compile --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.build:all: yarn build:darwin-arm64 && yarn build:darwin-x64 && yarn build:linux-x64-gnu && yarn build:linux-x64-musl && yarn build:linux-arm64-gnu && yarn build:windows-x64
scripts.build:dev: node scripts/prebuild.cjs && napi build --platform && node scripts/postbuild.cjs
scripts.lint: echo 'No TS source files to lint'
scripts.verify: yarn typecheck && yarn lint:rust && yarn test && yarn test:node && yarn pack:check && yarn version:check && yarn binary-size:check && yarn audit
